description: Run the HEC-RAS unsteady flow simulation for the Muncie project (~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie). From the resulting HDF5 output, identify the most upstream cross-section (highest River Station number) and extract its 'Flow' and 'Water Surface' time series. Generate the following files in ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/: 'cross_sections.txt' containing all River Station identifiers, 'rating_curve_data.csv' containing the 'Flow' and 'WSE' time series, 'rating_curve.png' showing a scatter plot of Stage (Y-axis) vs Discharge (X-axis), and 'rating_curve_report.txt' summarizing the River Station used along with min/max Flow and WSE values. The Python environment includes h5py, pandas, matplotlib, and rashdf.
